blurb: Investigated finite-sample bias in O-information, a measure of higher-order (synergistic vs. redundant) dependence. The work led to a peer-reviewed publication in Entropy.

projectTitle: Predicting the Accuracy of Dynamic Bayesian Network Structure Learning Algorithms
blurb: Benchmarked Bayesian-network structure-learning algorithms on synthetic causal data and predicted their accuracy from dataset and structure properties, aimed at medical causal discovery.

projectTitle: Survival of the Fittest Structure: Evolutionary Learning of Synergistic Dependencies
blurb: Introduced a synergy-aware evolutionary Bayesian-network structure learner using interaction-based triplet screening to recover higher-order, XOR-like synergistic dependencies.

projectTitle: A Bayesian Network Study to Uncover Bridging Mechanisms Causing the Comorbidity of Major Depressive Disorder and Cardio-Metabolic Diseases
Predictive Modeling of Symptom Reports and Changes in Functional Outcomes in Elderly Suffering from Multi-Morbidity: Leveraging Longitudinal Symptom Data
blurb: Used the Precipitating Events Project cohort of 754 adults aged 70+ to predict symptom reports and changes in functional outcomes in elderly patients with multimorbidity, comparing random forests, multi-output classifiers and regression on longitudinal symptom data.
